title: Master Electrician
description: Looking for a licensed master electrician for commercial and residential projects. Must have 5+ years experience with panel upgrades, conduit bending, and code compliance.

title: Commercial Plumber
description: Seeking an experienced commercial plumber for large-scale construction projects. Experience with medical gas systems and backflow prevention preferred.

title: HVAC Technician
description: Contract HVAC tech needed for seasonal maintenance and installation of commercial split systems. EPA 608 certification required.

title: Structural Welder
description: Experienced structural welder for steel fabrication shop. Must be certified in MIG/TIG/Stick. Blueprint reading required.

title: Finish Carpenter
description: Part-time finish carpenter for custom residential builds. Trim work, cabinetry installation, and hardwood flooring experience a plus.
